ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are denominated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the price is recorded */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "tick_volume" INTEGER /* Total tick volume of the stock on the given day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume of shares traded on the given day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the price is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the price is recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day for which the price is recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
